---
title: "Teaching"
description-meta: "Teaching experience of Juncheng Zhang"
title-block-banner: false
---

## University of Nottingham Ningbo China

- **Experimental and Behavioural Economics (ECON2043)**  
  Graduate Teaching Assistant, Autumn AY 2024-25 (Student evaluation: 97.6%); Spring AY 2025-26(Student evaluation: 98.6%)

- **Advanced Experimental and Behavioural Economics (ECON3079)**  
  Graduate Teaching Assistant, Spring AY 2024-25 (Student evaluation: 95.6%); Spring AY 2025-26 (Student evaluation: 100%)

- **Python Programming for Economics (ECON1059)**<br>
  Graduate Teaching Assistant, Autumn AY 2024-25 (Student evaluation: 99.3%)

## Guangzhou Institute of Science and Technology

- **Statistics**  
  Lecturer, Autumn AY 2022-23

- **Securities Investment**  
  Lecturer, Autumn AY 2022-23; Spring AY 2022-23
